unit: Unit 12: Everyday Life with Your Computer
title: Reading and Saving PDFs
drDigitalIntro:
PDFs look the same on any device.
• They're used for forms, receipts, and contracts.
• Open one in your browser, or download it to save it.
• To make a PDF, use Print > Save as PDF.

playgroundTask.goal: You downloaded a PDF from a website

steps.say: Navigate to recipebox.example to find a recipe PDF.
Click the Download button to save the recipe PDF.
Open the Downloads panel to see your saved file.

drDigitalSuccess: You downloaded a PDF! Downloads go to your Downloads folder where you can find them later.
drDigitalHint: Navigate to the page, click Download, then open the Downloads panel to confirm.
